criterion: Push retrieval benchmark score past P5 (>= 40/75) on the pinned 25-TC log using a reproducible, documented config.

acceptance_signals.description: Champion config (model + quantization + boost + mode) documented in the tracker
acceptance_signals.evidence: Final champion: CodeRankEmbed Q4_K_M, bm25=5.0, mode=code, jina-rerank-v2 → 42/75.
T5 finishes at 11/15 after reranker enabled.

acceptance_signals.description: Code-vs-md ranking pathology investigated and either fixed or documented
acceptance_signals.evidence: semantic_search mode defaults to code; full mode kept as opt-in. Documented in tracker §code/full modes.

acceptance_signals.description: Reranker A/B vs no-reranker decision recorded
acceptance_signals.evidence: jina-rerank-v2 wins +5 points over no-reranker on the pinned log; bge-v2-m3 only +2.

children.title: Query prefix experiment (negative result on Q4_K_M)
T5 expected-path fix (4 of 5 TCs had wrong truth)

progress_log.note: Initial pinned bench at HEAD ede25e69. Boost sweep peaks at 35/75 at bm25=5.0.
Fixed T5 expected paths — 4 of 5 cited wrong truth lists.
Default semantic_search to mode=code — TC-24 unblocks 0/3 → 3/3.
SPLADE-on-ROCm sparse stack landed (afc16394). Sparse precision-at-5 unchanged but recall stabilized across re-runs.
Reranker A/B/C complete: jina-rerank-v2 (Infinity) lifts champion 37 → 42 / 75. Bench passes P5. Closing goal.
